message:
feat(tui): input macro recording with JSONL serialization (2noh9.4.2)

Add --record-macro and --play-macro CLI flags. Recording uses ftui's
Program::start_recording() API and saves events to a JSONL file with
full key/modifier/timing roundtrip fidelity.

- MacroConfig struct for recording/playback paths
- macro_file module with save/load + event serialization
- 6 unit tests for serialization roundtrips
- PTY e2e test verifies macro file creation and format

Live playback deferred until ftui exposes event injection API.
Macro files can be replayed in tests via ProgramSimulator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
